case_title: FILLMORE CENTER PROJECT CORPORATION vs. ROUNDS, HAROLD et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE CENTER PROJECT CORPORATION SERVED MAR-25-1993, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DIGITAL PRESENTATIONS

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROUNDS, HAROLD DIGITAL PRESENTATIONS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1410 STEINER ST, APT. #807, S.F, CA $8,869.77 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,869.77, STAYED UNTIL MAY-12-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, PRIOR POSTING PERMITTED.
